prose:
Ethylene HOMO–LUMO gap — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2‐TZVP, density‐fitted) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: single‐point on the user‐supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/ethylene/ethylene.xyz` (no geometry optimization). SCF converged in 6 cycles. No warnings reported.

Reproducibility:
• Command:  
  `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --tier standard --solvent gas --charge 0 --multiplicity 1 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/ethylene/ethylene.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp4ruxcd6r/live.json`  
• Result JSON: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp4ruxcd6r/live.json`

Value reported below is the Koopmans‐style HOMO–LUMO gap (−7.6155818 eV to −0.17986527 eV).
